content:
# Boussinesq Approximation

**Summary**: A simplification for investigating density-dependent flows and natural convection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] used the modified Boussinesq (OB) approach to reduce complexity while accounting for rock property variations.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Standard simplification for buoyancy-driven flows in porous media.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Comparison with a memory-based model.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The modified OB based mathematical model described the HFI process using Darcy equation under LTE and NOLTE conditions. ([[2016-david|DAVID, 2016, p. 18]])
- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Found to be a valid, simpler alternative when modified correctly.
